info.screen.roleid.diviner:
Diviner (Passenger team)
Starts with a [Crystal Ball]. Right-click while aiming at a corpse to begin a 10-second channel (must stand still).
Upon completion, reveals: the victim's time of death + one random killer clue (3 types: ① killer alive/dead + killer name [??? at range, revealed when close]; ② killer's exact role; ③ killer globally highlighted for 1 sec).
Each use has 50% chance to break the crystal ball; can be repurchased for 300 coins; 60s cooldown; each corpse may only be divined once.
Special: if the target is the InsaneKiller disguised as a corpse, they stab themselves to death with a knife.
message.noellesroles.diviner.intro: §5✦ Diviner ✦ §rYou received the §dCrystal Ball§r: right-click on a corpse to begin a §6§l10-second channel§r — you must §cstand still§r. Cooldown %1$ss; repurchase for %2$s coins; each corpse only once.
message.noellesroles.diviner.channel_mov: §cChannel interrupted — do not move during divination!
message.noellesroles.diviner.break: §7The crystal ball shatters in your hands...
message.noellesroles.diviner.no_corpse: Crystal ball isn't aimed at a corpse — face one and right-click
message.noellesroles.diviner.not_corpse: They're still alive; the crystal ball only divines corpses
message.noellesroles.diviner.already: This corpse has already been divined — try another
message.noellesroles.diviner.insane_kill: Your divination broke the disguise — the InsaneKiller stabbed themselves to death!
info.screen.roleid.delayer:
Delayer (Killer team)
Passive: each kill extends the game by 20s; when 1m25s remain, extend by another 30s (once per round).
Active [Time Anchor]: press the ability key, spend 75 coins to anchor the current state; the anchor lasts 20s, then you automatically rewind (only yourself):
position, money and potion effects are restored; inventory and item cooldowns are NOT rewound. If you are dead by then, the rewind will not revive you.
The rewind is not a teleport - you glide back to the anchor ALONG your path: your position is sampled every 2s while anchored, then replayed in reverse.
While rewinding your screen shows the same gray time-stop filter; everyone else is briefly dazed with a glass-break sound. Cooldown 120s.
Warning: if you are hit while the anchor is still active (within 20s), you are forced to rewind immediately and end up prone, unable to move, for 30s.

info.screen.roleid.manipulator:
Killer Faction
Open your inventory to select and possess any player within 200 blocks. No prior mark is required. Your camera binds to their body and you drive them with the movement/jump keys.
While possessed the target is blinded and cannot move, use items, open their inventory or use skills; you cannot use their items, but you can cast their ability as them (cooldown on them).
Driving the puppet into the void bounces it back to avoid suicide. If the target dies while controlled, you gain 75 coins.
Open your inventory at any time to cancel control. Control cooldown is 80 seconds.

info.screen.roleid.dnf_killer:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Has independent blood system.
Automatically gains Throwing Knife and Crowbar at night.
Can spend blood to buy Throwing Knife and Lockpick.
Press skill key (G by default) to request aid.
Gain blood by consuming corpses, 10 blood per corpse.
Achieve personal ending win after accumulating enough blood.
Unlock personal ending after consuming enough corpses.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_soldier:
Sheriff Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Armed force of the Civilian faction.
Start with Baton and Revolver.
Win by killing all Killers.
Max 2 Soldiers at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_chef:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Responsible for cooking food for passengers.
Can turn ingredients (cornmeal, flour, suspicious meat) into rations.
Press skill key (G by default) to process corpses (consumes capacity).
Starts with Chef Hat.
Has daily cooking capacity limit.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_psychologist:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Maintains mental health of passengers.
Restores others' sanity through:
- Cleaning spider webs in the library
- Giving lectures at the podium
- Using the toilet
- Cleaning dust in the prison
info.screen.roleid.dnf_locksmith:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Skilled in lockpicking.
Can use Lockpicks to open locked carriage doors.
Can also repair broken door locks (right-click door).
Max 4 Locksmiths at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_civilian:
Civilian Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
No special abilities.
Need to survive until all Killers are dead.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_maniac:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Hidden helper of the Killers.
Can kill players at night.
Kills are recorded.
Max 2 at a time.
Stunned (but not killed) by gunshots.
No penalty for killing Killer faction players.
Can help Killers win.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_poisoner:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Can poison food.
Press skill key (G by default) to use poison.
Gains Toxic Heart for killing poisoned players.
Each Toxic Heart increases an extra kill count.
Can unlock special abilities via a book in the Underworld.
Max 1 at a time.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_abyss:
Killer Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Can forcibly send targets to the Underworld using Abyss Tentacle.
Hold use key to charge and release area attack.
Hit targets get Slowness.
Gains invisibility and speed continuously.
Cannot move while charging.
Max 2 at a time.
Start with Abyss Tentacle.
info.screen.roleid.dnf_ghost:
Ghost Faction
Exclusive class for Abandoned Prison Seven Nights mode.
Special class allowing continued gameplay after death.
Gains Ghost State effect, can phase through terrain.
Can see all players' positions after death.
Can interact with living players.

info.screen.roleid.wizard:
Wizard (Killer team)
Starts with a [Staff] and a [Potion]. ALL of your coin income (kills and natural regen) converts into [Mana], shown as a bossbar; you no longer use coins.
Staff: right-click to charge a magic fire arrow that pierces up to 2 players and kills instantly on hit; left-click to knock back.
Potion: on use, goes on cooldown, grants a large amount of mana, and makes you immune to one lethal attack for the next 60 seconds.
Magic pool: Sneak + ability key to switch spells, ability key to cast the current spell:
· Armor: spend mana, open your inventory and click a player's avatar to grant them a shield (the shield lasts only 30 seconds).
· Frost Shock: spend mana to root all nearby players (except you), blocking movement and view rotation.
· Shroud Shadow: blind all non-killer players for 6s; during a blackout it drains extra mana to last until the blackout ends.
· Explosion!: spend mana to arm; your next staff cast releases a wall-piercing nine-ring fireball (acts like a grenade).
